label: Wide-shell 2BR / 1 bath — side-split with HALL in middle band and combined GREAT ROOM (gr style, living+dining merged). Bedrooms stack front-to-rear on the LEFT (master front, standard rear). Hall sits in the middle band south of common bath; both bedrooms door into the hall; common bath doors into the hall; hall opens east into the great_room. Great_room + kitchen form the LDK column on the right.

adjacencies.note: master (front) and standard (rear) stack vertically in the left column — shared horizontal wall only, no door between them.
master's east wall has a door opening east into the hall — master's primary public access. The hall provides a buffer between master and the great_room (vs. master dooring directly into great).
standard's south wall opens into the hall — standard's only public access. Standard is north of the hall in the left column.
standard's east wall touches common's west wall at the rear — shared wall only, no door. Bath block sits between standard (west) and the LDK column (east) at the rear.
common bath's south wall opens south into the hall — the single bath's only door. Both bedrooms reach the bath via the hall. DEFAULT host of the 'common_access' door-host group.

common bath shares plumbing wall with kitchen. ALTERNATE host of the 'common_access' group: door placed here only when shared wall >= 1.5 m (clear 0.80 + frame 0.20 + guard 0.5); falls back to hall on compact lots.

hall's east wall is an open mouth into the great_room (no door — codebase rule: hallway↔great_room is always open-plan). 0.9 m mouth — PH minimum for single-person flow; the compact 14x10 envelope can't accommodate a wider mouth without breaking the y-budget.
great_room + kitchen form the open LDK (gr style) stacked front-to-rear in the right column.

lot_adjustment_profiles.name: compact_w_hall_gr_single_bath
lot_adjustment_profiles.rationale: On compact wide lots (<75 sqm buildable, e.g. 14x10 m = 60 sqm), kitchen depth floors at 1.8 m for galley work-triangle clearance. Hall depth at 1.0 m hits PH minimum corridor (0.9 m clear + frame). Common bath at preferred range 3.0-4.5 sqm — single bath should be at least 3 sqm to accommodate toilet + shower + lavatory.

notes: Wide-shell 2BR / 1 bath topology with mid-band HALL and combined GREAT ROOM (gr style). Replaces the older 1s_2br_wd_side_split_bath_gr (no hall — standard had to door directly into great_room, awkward access) and 1s_2br_wd_side_split_bath_gr (removed) (different bath position, also no hall).
Floor band: 50-70 sqm buildable. Designed against 14x10 m (60 sqm) as the canonical compact case.
Layout intent (canonical form — brief.carport_side='right' or 'none'):
Rear band:    [STANDARD       | COMMON T&B | KITCHEN          ]
Middle band:  [(master cont.) | HALL       | (great cont.)    ]
Front band:   [MASTER BEDROOM             | GREAT ROOM        ]
Three sub-columns:
- LEFT  (~4 m): [master front, hall middle, standard rear] — bedrooms stack with hall threading between them on the south side of common bath
- MID   (~2 m): common T&B at the rear, north of hall; standard.east = common.west wall (no door)
- RIGHT (~4 m): [great_room front, kitchen rear] — the LDK column
Hall is a 4-walled circulation node:
- NORTH: door to common T&B (bath's only door)
- SOUTH: door to master bedroom (master's primary public access)
- WEST: wall to master/standard column (no public connection on this side)
- EAST: open mouth into great_room (public LDK connection)
Additionally hall.north overlaps with standard.south at the bath block's east end, hosting standard's bedroom door into the hall.
Single-bath access flow:
- Master: bedroom door north (or east?) into hall; hall opens east to great
- Standard: bedroom door south into hall (standard sits north of hall)
- Bath: south door into hall; both bedrooms reach it via the hall without transiting each other or the bath
LDK arrangement (gr style):
- Living + Dining combined into one open great_room
- Kitchen stacked behind great_room in the right column
- Hall opens east into the public space (great_room)
- Total LDK floor: great ~18-22 sqm + kitchen ~6-8 sqm

Wet-stack: common T&B shares the wet wall with kitchen (common.east = kitchen.west, 1.0 m wet_core). Combined with the dirty kitchen in the rear setback, all wet utilities land in one rear bay along the rear elevation.

Carport: not declared in the base topology — NCP form. To add a side carport, add a building_void at front_right. For front-parallel carport, brief.carport_side='front' bumps the front setback to 3 m. When brief.carport_side='left', the runner mirrors the topology so LDK ends up on the left.
No fallback declared. This IS the simplest single-bath wide-shell topology now — earlier fallbacks targeted the deprecated _side_split_gr.
